case_title: KIRA ROSENBERGER VS. DEEMO ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSENBERGER, KIRA AS TO DEFENDANT DEEMO ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CHEZ PAREE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENBERGER, KIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEEMO ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CHEZ PAREE $45,446.57 PRINCIPAL, $2,714.51 INTEREST, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $48,367.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
